overview.zh: 巴西联邦共和国位于南美洲，是该大陆面积最大、人口最多的国家，拥有亚马孙雨林等丰富的自然资源。文化多元融合，在农业、矿业与足球方面享有世界声誉。
overview.en: The Federative Republic of Brazil is in South America and is the continent's largest country by area and population, home to rich natural resources including the Amazon rainforest. With a richly blended culture, it is world-renowned for agriculture, mining and football.

capitalHistory.zh: 巴西利亚是一座规划新城，由建筑师尼迈耶等设计，1960年落成并取代里约热内卢成为首都，以现代主义城市布局闻名。
capitalHistory.en: Brasília is a planned city designed by architects including Oscar Niemeyer; completed in 1960, it replaced Rio de Janeiro as the capital and is celebrated for its modernist urban layout.

climate.zh: 以热带气候为主，亚马孙地区终年湿热，中部为热带草原气候，南部部分地区属亚热带气候。
climate.en: Predominantly tropical: the Amazon region is hot and humid year-round, the center has a tropical savanna climate, and parts of the south are subtropical.

note.zh: 曲调由弗兰西斯科·曼努埃尔·达席尔瓦谱写，歌词于1922年正式确定，风格庄严激昂。
note.en: Set to a melody by Francisco Manuel da Silva, with lyrics officially fixed in 1922; the anthem is stately and rousing.

name.zh: 毛蟹爪兰（伊佩黄花常作象征）
name.en: Golden trumpet tree (ipê-amarelo), a common national emblem

name.zh: 厓䴕（鵎鵼，热带代表鸟类）

note.zh: 巴西队五次夺得世界杯冠军，是夺冠次数最多的国家。
note.en: Brazil has won the World Cup five times, more than any other nation.

colorNotes.zh: 绿黄两色源自国旗，象征森林与矿产，是国家的标志色。
colorNotes.en: Green and yellow from the flag symbolize forests and mineral wealth and are the nation's signature colors.

colorNotes.zh: 紫色在传统上多与哀悼相关，节庆场合较少使用。
colorNotes.en: Purple is traditionally linked with mourning and is used less in festive contexts.

culturalTaboos.zh: 社交热情、注重人际关系，见面常有拥抱或贴面礼；'OK'手势在当地含义不佳，应避免。
culturalTaboos.en: Social warmth and personal relationships matter, with hugs or cheek kisses common; the 'OK' hand gesture is offensive locally and should be avoided.

formatting.zh: 使用巴西葡萄牙语，名词分阴阳性；日期用 日/月/年。
formatting.en: Uses Brazilian Portuguese with grammatically gendered nouns; dates use DD/MM/YYYY.

formatting.zh: 数字用句点作千位分隔、逗号作小数点，如 1.234,56。
formatting.en: Numbers use a period as the thousands separator and a comma as the decimal point, e.g. 1.234,56.

funFacts.zh: 巴西是世界上使用葡萄牙语人口最多的国家。
funFacts.en: Brazil is the most populous Portuguese-speaking country in the world.

funFacts.zh: 亚马孙雨林大部分位于巴西境内，是地球上生物多样性最丰富的地区之一。
funFacts.en: Most of the Amazon rainforest lies within Brazil, one of the most biodiverse regions on Earth.

label.zh: 联合国教科文组织世界遗产名录
